name: yulora
description: Local-first Markdown desktop editor MVP shell.

scripts.dev:electron: wait-on dist-electron/main/main.js dist-electron/preload/preload.js http://localhost:5173 && node ./node_modules/cross-env/dist/bin/cross-env.js VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron .
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron
scripts.clean: rimraf dist dist-electron tsconfig.electron.tsbuildinfo tsconfig.renderer.tsbuildinfo tsconfig.vitest.tsbuildinfo
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.renderer.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.electron.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.vitest.json
